variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 713 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 713 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 713 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Mann Filter C 1577 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 713
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER air filters for clean air intake and optimum protection for your engine, mass air flow sensor & other sensitive components / They meet requirements of modern engine technology. Highest dirt holding capacity and dirt separation efficiency, low flow resistance and high pleat stability ensure functional reliability during the entire service interval.

variants.title: FIL Filter HPU 4407 | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 713
variants.description: Genuine FIL Filter HPU 4407. Easy to install and replace, the HPU 4407 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
